title: The Crooked Way
overview: A war veteran suffering from amnesia, returns to Los Angeles from a San Francisco veterans hospital hoping to learn who he is and discovers his criminal past.

trailers.title: The Crooked Way (1949 Film-Noir) John Payne - He's got a date ...with DEATH!
